creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
Hello.

I've dded FreeBSD 14.2 RELEASE on a sd card and I tried to boot it with my Raspberry Pi zero 2 w :

# dd if=FreeBSD-14.2-RELEASE-arm64-aarch64-RPI.img of=/dev/sdf

but unfortunately I got the raimbow screen :

https://ibb.co/cXKFCtvJ

So I suppose that the fix hasn't been upstreamed for FreeBSD 14.2-RELEASE. 

What can I do ?
